# VBA fixture provenance

`xlsxwriter-vbaProject.bin.b64` is a Base64 encoding of
`examples/vbaProject.bin` from the official XlsxWriter repository. It contains
the example `say_hello` VBA procedure and is used to materialize deterministic
XLSM certification fixtures.

- Upstream: https://github.com/jmcnamara/XlsxWriter
- Upstream file SHA-256:
  `0ced1464b3677e98f5e3a8c5d80135e18dc98dca39299f1a8cfd2a00999fbf9f`
- License: BSD-2-Clause
- Copyright: 2013-2025 John McNamara

The BSD-2-Clause license text is reproduced in `LICENSE.txt`.
